overview: MenuCraft is a restaurant training app for Bubba's 33 that lets staff browse the menu by category and sub-category, view recipe cards, and walk through step-by-step training."
features: Browse menu by category and sub-category with cover photos
Drill down from category to sub-category to recipe card to training
Admin portal to manage categories, sub-categories, and menu items
Photo uploads for categories, sub-categories, and items
Step-by-step training flow for each menu item
